To Strike
Off Calendar Jul-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dennis C. Hyde, Esq. of WIEGEL & FRIED, LLP 552-8230 for defendants JEFFREY LEIBOVITZ and LOUISE BIRD moving to strike portions of the Complaint
Matthew K. Hindman, Esq. of ZITRIN & MASTROMONACO LLP 956-4030 for Plaintiff and opposing party
*Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant JEFFREY LEIBOVITZ' motion to strike is denied in its entirety. However, the moton to strike is granted in the Prayer for injunctive relief. (JJM/MD) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jul-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dennis C. Hyde, Esq. of WIEGEL & FRIED, LLP 552-8230 for defendants JEFFREY LEIBOVITZ and LOUISE BIRD demurring party
Matthew K. Hindman, Esq. of ZITRIN & MASTROMONACO LLP 956-4030 for Plaintiff and opposing party
*Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant JEFFREY LEIBOVITZ' demurrer is overruled as to Causes of Action 1, 2, 3, 5, 6 7, 8 and 9. Sustained with leave as to Cause of Action 4; intentional infliction of emotional distress to allege "outrageous" conduct. 10 days leave to amend. (JJM/MD) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
